layout.promoBanner: 20% off on monthly refrigerated truck rentals this week!

footer.about: The leading company in refrigerated and frozen transport services in Jeddah and Saudi Arabia, serving you with professionalism and safety to preserve your products.
footer.copyright: Copyright © {{year}} Rokn Elryan Refrigerated Transport. All rights reserved.

faqs.q: What temperature ranges are available in your refrigerated trucks?
faqs.a: Our trucks are equipped with advanced cooling and freezing units that allow temperature control down to deep freezing, depending on the type of goods (food, medicine, etc.).

faqs.q: Do you provide monthly rental services for companies?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide refrigerated truck (Truck) rentals on monthly and annual contracts for companies, factories, and restaurants with professional drivers.
Absolutely, we provide refrigerated and frozen transport services from Jeddah to all regions and cities of Saudi Arabia.

faqs.q: How is the safety of products ensured during transport?
faqs.a: Our trucks undergo periodic inspections of cooling units, and temperatures are monitored throughout the journey to ensure goods arrive in high quality without any spoilage.

hero.title2: The First Choice for Refrigerated Transport
hero.desc: We offer top-quality refrigerated and frozen transport services in Jeddah and all cities of the Kingdom, with precise temperature control to keep your products fresh and safe.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Rokn Elryan Refrigerated Transport: Your strategic partner in managing and securing cold supply chains for factories and major corporations in Saudi Arabia.

story.title: Our Story & Journey
story.p1: Rokn Elryan began with a modest fleet and a clear strategic vision: to elevate the level of refrigerated logistics services to meet the strict requirements of major companies and factories.
story.p2: Today, we are proud to manage one of the most modern refrigerated fleets in the Kingdom, equipped with the latest cooling and temperature tracking devices (Data Loggers), becoming the first choice for the food, pharmaceutical, and catering sectors.
story.p3: We don't just transport goods; we manage an integrated supply chain and commit to providing Service Level Agreements (SLAs) that ensure the continuity of our clients' business with the highest efficiency.

vision.title: Our Vision 2030
vision.desc: To be the strongest logistics pillar in the cold chain across the Kingdom, directly contributing to the realization of Saudi Vision 2030 to enhance the Kingdom's position as a global logistics hub.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Providing safe, precise refrigerated transport solutions compliant with SFDA requirements, ensuring product quality and protection on every journey.

values.title: Corporate Values
values.desc: Strict compliance with storage standards, reliability and punctuality in distribution schedules, innovation in tracking technologies, and building long-term strategic partnerships.

fleet.title: Our Refrigerated Fleet
fleet.subtitle: We own a comprehensive fleet of refrigerated trucks equipped with the latest technologies to meet all distribution and inter-city transport needs, guaranteeing temperatures from -18°C to +4°C.

dyna.title: Refrigerated Dyna (4 Ton)
dyna.desc: Ideal for daily inner-city distribution, catering deliveries, medical warehouses, and commercial branches.
dyna.capacity: Load Capacity: Up to 4 Tons / 6 Pallets

jumbo.title: Refrigerated Jumbo (6-8 Ton)
jumbo.desc: The perfect choice for medium requirements and transporting food and medicines in commercial quantities to feed retail chains.
jumbo.capacity: Load Capacity: Up to 8 Tons / 12 Pallets

trailer.title: Refrigerated Trailer (25 Ton)
trailer.desc: Dedicated for factories and strategic linking between major cities and regional warehouses (Linehaul Logistics).
trailer.capacity: Load Capacity: Up to 25 Tons / 24 Pallets

servicesPage.title: Refrigeration Services
servicesPage.desc: At Rokn Elryan, we provide comprehensive solutions for transporting your goods at controlled temperatures, to cover all your logistics needs.

items.title: Refrigerated & Frozen Transport
items.desc: Transporting all types of fresh and frozen food, as well as medicines, using trucks equipped with high-quality cooling systems.
features: Freezing and cooling to precise degrees

items.title: Refrigerated Truck Rental
items.desc: Refrigerated truck rental services to meet the needs of companies, factories, and restaurants, whether for daily trips or monthly contracts.

items.title: Food Product Distribution
items.desc: Taking charge of daily routes for distributing food products to supermarkets and restaurants with precision and strict punctuality.
features: Professional team in loading and unloading

items.title: Intercity Refrigerated Transport
items.desc: Transporting goods with different load capacities (Truck, Jumbo, Trailer) from Jeddah to Riyadh, Dammam, the Southern Region, and all regions of the Kingdom.
